title: Pnyx I controlled view geometry
status: reconstructed from the verified production record

camera.placement: behind and slightly above the audience

assembly_geometry.speaker_faces: southwest, toward the audience and camera

limitations: The hero is an artistic reconstruction, not a geodetic or archaeological document.
Copernicus GLO-30 is a modern 30 m digital surface model.
The camera station has an uncertainty of tens of metres.
This reconstructed JSON preserves the verified parameters; the original sampled DEM array was not retained.
